name: WARPAINT LONDON  LS -,25
summary: Warpaint London PLC is a colour cosmetics business creating and selling branded cosmetics, both directly and through distribution partnerships. The company's brands include W7 and Technic, and it focuses on affordable and trend-led makeup products. TICKER: Warpaint London PLC creates and sells branded cosmetics, including W7 and Technic, focusing on affordable and trend-led makeup products through direct sales and distribution partnerships.
